title: trigonella corniculata subsp. balansae
intro: Trigonella corniculata subsp. balansae, also known as Balansa's licorice or Persian licorice, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae and is closely related to the licorice root (Glycyrrhiza glabra). It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trigonella corniculata subsp. balansae include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
